notableEvents.label: Gunnar Henderson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Gunnar Henderson out at 1st.
